## Summary

Describe the change and motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Styling/UI change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] Ran local checks (`npm run check`)
- [ ] Verified behavior manually
- [ ] No secrets added to repo

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Add before/after screenshots if relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] Kept change scope focused
- [ ] Preserved accessibility semantics/attributes
- [ ] Updated docs if needed
